name: Nitropage With Postgresql
tagline: Nitropage is an extensible, visual website builder, offering a growing library of versatile building blocks, focal-point image cropping and sovereign font man
description:
Nitropage is an extensible, visual website builder, offering a growing library of versatile building blocks, focal-point image cropping and sovereign font man

Docs: https://nitropage.org?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  nitropage:
    image: nitropage/nitropage
    environment:
      - NP_AUTH_SALT=ZGY2YjJjZWM3MDYzMzA0OTBmNGQ1MTcz
      - NP_AUTH_PASSWORD=50b1c9e6e00336ee500fd3ad2cd009bc
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://u808079f154:0866ab1dc8cc940d21a36de06dede31d@postgresql:5432/${POSTGRESQL_DATABASE:-nitropage}
    volumes:
      - nitropage-data:/app/.data
    depends_on:
      postgresql:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:3000/admin
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 15
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42081:3000
  postgresql:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    volumes:
      - nitropage-postgresql-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=u808079f154
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=0866ab1dc8cc940d21a36de06dede31d
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRESQL_DATABASE:-nitropage}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-liv96bbb779} -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-nitropage_with_postgresql}
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  nitropage-data: null
  nitropage-postgresql-data: null
